Write an 11th commandment.
Tell your child you're divorcing their father.
Apply for a job as a professional mourner for people with no friends.
Convince a stranger to buy your grandmother's ashes.
Convince a stranger to buy a 'dehydrated water' kit (just add water!)
Convince your boss to write you into her will.
Tell your date that you are technically still 'on the run' from a small country.
Explain to your guest that they can't use the bathroom because your pet fish lives in the toilet bowl.
Inform your friend that they can't turn on the lights because it 'offends the house.'
Tell your mom why you have a bouncer guarding the basement.
Write a review for a hotel that charges extra for breathing the air.
Write a complaint about a gym that requires formal business while working out.
Write a how to guide on making microwave mac n cheese.
Write a resignation letter stating you are leaving to become a professional gambler.
Apologize for setting fire to your friend's plant.
Warn a stranger about the invisible bees around the corner
Create an ad for a brand of shampoo that makes your hair smell like old books.
Create a slogan for a gym that promises you will leave 'slightly more tired.'
Create a slogan for a restaurant that only serves food you can eat without teeth.
Confess to the priest that you've been using the holy water to make gourmet soup.
Confess to your cat that you ate their tuna treat.
Ask your partner to pick you up from work.
Persuade your fiance to get matching gold plated teeth instead of wedding rings.
Hypnotize a grizzly bear into thinking you are its long-lost cub.
Write your communist manifesto.
Tell your neighbors they have to get rid of their lawn gnome.
Tell your doctor you believe you are slowly turning into a pigeon.
Give a motivational speech to a group of worms.
Write a legal disclaimer for a teleportation device that occasionally swaps your ears.
Write a haiku about your breakfast today.
Write a prenup specifically for your shared collection of cool rocks.
Review the experience of accidentally walking into a spiderweb.
Explain to your Uber driver why you are wearing a full suit of armor.
Request a refund for a psychic reading because you 'already knew that'.
Write a resignation letter on behalf of your left shoe.
Ask your dentist if you can keep your wisdom teeth to make a necklace.
Apologize to a spider for accidentally destroying its beautiful web.
Write a missing poster for your sense of childhood wonder.
Tell a palm reader that your life line is 'too short' and demand they draw a longer one with a Sharpie.
Tell a pilot you'll take over the landing because you have over 100 hours in a flight simulator.
Where do all the left socks go when they disappear from the dryer?
Why do mosquitoes exist?
If you were the last person on Earth, how would you spend your very last day?
What is a piece of advice you were given as a child that turned out to be completely wrong?
What is something you've changed your mind about in the last year, and why?
You are founding a new country on a deserted island. What are the first three laws you write, and what is the mandatory punishment for breaking the most sacred one?
Write a letter to your 80-year-old self.
Write a review for a cursed toaster that only burns prophecies into your bread.
Write a review for this game.
Sell your bottle of infinite coffee.
